title: Dropship Deployments
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM DropshipDeploy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(NearestDestination_Localised, NearestDestination, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM DropshipDeploy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} dropship insertion(s) executed during the report period. Each deployment marks a hot-drop into a live settlement — you left the ship behind and went in on foot.
details.help: DropshipDeploy fires when the player is dropped off by an Apex or NPC dropship at a settlement. NearestDestination identifies the site.

tagLines: Dropship deployment logs compiled. Tactical insertion records forwarded to the relevant operational command.
You left the ship. You went in. That's either brave or stupid — probably both.
Every dropship insertion is a one-way ticket until the extraction arrives. It always arrives. Usually.
